title: Notion fetch by URL (title, text, path)
userStory: As a developer, I want fetch_page(url) that returns a Notion page's title, text, and path so that the ingest endpoint can turn a URL into storable content.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a Notion page URL or id, fetch_page returns {title, text, path} using an official Notion integration token (NOTION_TOKEN)
text is the page's block tree flattened to markdown/plain text
path is the materialized ancestor chain (e.g. 'Notebooks/Professional/Job Hunting/Target role')
Distinct, clear errors for: page not shared with the integration, invalid URL, missing token
Verify: fetch the real Target-role page and confirm title='Target role', non-empty text, and the expected 4-level path
